title: tender buttery uruguayan lamb papillote
description: a crowd-pleasing dish featuring tender lamb, wrapped in buttery papillote with crisp iceberg lettuce.
instructions: season the lamb with salt and black pepper.
heat 1 tablespoon of butter in a large oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
add the lamb and sear until browned on all sides, about 2 minutes per side.
transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and cook for 20 minutes.
remove the skillet from the oven and top the lamb with the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter, garlic, and parsley.
fold the papillote paper over the lamb to create a packet, making sure to seal the edges.
return the skillet to the oven and cook for an additional 10-12 minutes, or until the lamb is tender and the papillote is crispy.
remove the papillote from the oven and carefully open it to reveal the tender lamb.
serve the lamb with the shredded iceberg lettuce and a squeeze of lemon juice.
